# RMVS — RMonaghan Venture Studios
> Digital Innovation Lab — AI-Integrated Products

## Organization
- Name: RMonaghan Venture Studios (RMVS)
- URL: https://www.rmvs.org
- Founded by: Rory Monaghan
- Location: Pittsburgh, PA
- Focus: AI-integrated iOS apps, developer tooling, clinical AI, end-to-end product development

## Products & Projects
- ePrescience: AI-powered learning suite for students (Live on App Store)
  - URL: https://www.rmvs.org/projects/eprescience
  - Technologies: Swift, CoreML, Firebase, RevenueCat
- Spec'd: Mobile companion for car enthusiasts (Live on App Store)
  - URL: https://www.rmvs.org/projects/specd
  - Technologies: Swift, CloudKit
- Auron Intelligence: Medical AI for arterial CT analysis (In Development)
  - URL: https://www.rmvs.org/projects/auron
  - Technologies: Python, PyTorch, DICOM, AWS
- Neura: Smart sleep mask with EOG sensors (Prototype)
  - URL: https://www.rmvs.org/projects/neura
  - Technologies: Swift, BLE, PCB Design, Signal Processing

## Technical Capabilities
- Mobile: Swift, Xcode, iOS, Metal, App Store Connect, RevenueCat
- Web: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
- AI/ML: Claude, GPT, Gemini, ElevenLabs, CoreML, PyTorch
- Infrastructure: AWS, Cloudflare, Railway, PostgreSQL, Firebase

## Blog
- URL: https://www.rmvs.org/blog
- RSS: https://www.rmvs.org/feed.xml
- Topics: Build logs, architecture decisions, tool reviews, methodology deep-dives
